title: io.sparkedsense.inference.transcription
description: Speech-to-text output emitted by a MEC gateway or edge ASR node.

language.description: ISO-639-1 (e.g., 'pt', 'en') or ISO-639-3 code detected or configured.

duration_processed_ms.description: Length of audio processed for this transcription.

source_event_id.description: Event id of the raw audio window this transcription was derived from.
